subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, the All-Prevailing, the Self-Subsisting, think not that thou hast been forgotten, or that mention of thee hath fallen silent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المهیمن القیوم همچو تصور منما که فراموش شدی و یا از ذکرت خاموش
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection
